title: Australian Keto Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe that combines the flavors of Australia with a keto twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped green onions to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the gooey honey and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and stir in the Parmigiano Reggiano cheese until melted.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional green onions if desired.
Cook time may vary depending on desired level of doneness for the beef.
Be sure to cook the beef to a safe internal temperature of at least 145°F (63°C).
This recipe serves 4 people and can be adjusted to suit individual keto diet needs.
Nutrition information is an estimate and may vary based on specific ingredients used.
